ogTitle: Roche Creek vs Rochedale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Roche Creek and Rochedale.
heading: Roche Creek vs Rochedale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Roche Creek, Queensland and Rochedale, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Roche Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Rochedale (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Roche Creek or Rochedale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Roche Creek has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Rochedale scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Roche Creek scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Rochedale scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Roche Creek or Rochedale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Roche Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
